title: FSSC 22000 V6 Training Outline
subtitle: A 1-day HRD Corp-claimable quality workshop for applying FSSC 22000 version 6 requirements at work.
whyThisMatters: FSSC 22000 V6 Training Outline helps quality, operations, and process teams translate FSSC 22000 version 6 into daily routines, evidence, and improvement habits. The session covers Food Safety System Certification FSSC 22000 Version 6, Introduction & Objectives, and Introduction and Objective so participants can support standards, audits, and process discipline with more confidence.
builtFor: Supervisors and process owners involved in compliance work
Employees who support audits, records, or continual improvement
walkAwayWith: Understand the key requirements and workplace expectations behind the topic.
Recognize how process discipline, evidence, and records support compliance.
Apply practical improvement habits to daily operations.
Participate more confidently in implementation, review, or audit activities.

modules.title: Food Safety System Certification FSSC 22000 Version 6

methodologyCaption: Participants connect standards and quality concepts to workplace examples through guided discussion, exercises, and practical review activities.
